raw_consumer_statement: I prepaid for a lodging in full with a different banks credit card. Upon checkout the lodge demanded full payment AGAIN saying the first payment didnt go through. The second payment was made using a Citi card. I checked and the first payment DID indeed go through so I cancelled ther second payment with Citi. Its a duplicate payment and Citi refuses to refund me despite me showing proof I already paid the first bill in full and did not owe any money to the lodge. Citi must refund me
